apa.label: APA 7th Edition
apa.bibliography_format: Author, A. A. (Year). Title of work. Publisher. URL

mla.label: MLA 9th Edition
mla.bibliography_format: Author Last, First. Title of Work. Publisher, Year.

chicago.label: Chicago 17th Edition
chicago.inline_format: Footnotes (N) or (Author Year) for author-date variant
chicago.bibliography_format: Author Last, First. Title of Work. City: Publisher, Year.

harvard.label: Harvard
harvard.bibliography_format: Author Last, First Initial. (Year) Title of work. Publisher.
harvard.when_to_use: Sciences, social sciences, UK and Australian academia

ieee.label: IEEE
ieee.bibliography_format: [1] A. A. Author, "Title of article," Journal Name, vol. X, no. X, pp. XX-XX, Year.

vancouver.label: Vancouver
vancouver.bibliography_format: 1. Author AA, Author BB. Title of article. Journal Abbreviation. Year;Volume(Issue):Pages.
